title: Broken Link Crawler — Input
description: Crawl a site and find every broken link. Returns one summary row + one row per broken link with full referrer trail.

url.title: Start URL
url.description: The URL to start crawling from. Same-origin pages will be discovered + crawled.

maxPages.title: Max pages to crawl
maxPages.description: How many pages of the site to discover links from (default 25, max 500).

maxLinksPerPage.title: Max links per page
maxLinksPerPage.description: Cap how many links to extract from each page (default 200, max 1000).

includeExternal.title: Check external links too
includeExternal.description: If true, links to other domains are also checked (but not crawled). Defaults to true.
